GitHubApiData.name: 1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce
GitHubApiData.description: This is the repository for 1st year resources for the 2022 scheme of RV College of Engineering. Contributors: Ananth M Athreya, Aditi Shastri, dath2006
